content:
# elizaos-plugins/plugin-ollama Daily Update (Apr 2, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development activity on April 2, 2026, focused on identifying a packaging issue affecting the installation process. No new features, bug fixes, or refactoring were completed during this period.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*   **No development work was completed during this period.**

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   None.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None.

## NEW ISSUES
### Packaging and Installation
*   [#22](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-ollama/issues/22): Reported that the `postinstall` script fails because `scripts/install-ollama.js` is missing from the published tarball, causing errors during package installation.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None.
